transcript.text:
(This is Gumi, Gyeongsangbuk-do)
('Incheon Bunsik')
Are you open right now?
Yes, but
not everything on the menu is available
It's hard for her if I order a lot
4 rolls of kimbap!
(Okay, I'll make it for you)
(But you can make the ramyun yourself)
I also have a bunsik place!
You do?
But if the owner eats all the food...
(I'll eat everything since I'm not the owner)
(I can't believe this)
You're a pig, not a human
Hello everyone

I'm here in Gumi today
There's a bunsik restaurant I wanted to come to
so here I am
It's right over there!
('Incheon Bunsik' Gumi, Gyeongsangbuk-do)
I can feel its aura from all the way over here
Is the owner here?
I don't think the owner's here
Excuse me
Excuse me!!
Is anybody here?
(Did you go somewhere?) I don't think anyone's here
I'll wait for a bit
(Should I give up and leave..?)
Oh! She's here!!
Are you open right now?

Yes, but...
There's not much to eat!
Oh really? What do you have?
The menu!
Not everything on the menu is available
- What is available? - Before, I used to make everything on the menu,
but since I'm older, I can't do it all
Since it'll be too much work for her if I order a lot,
I'll order a simple bite to eat
Just a simple bite!
4 rolls of kimbap!
(What did I just tell you..?)
2 servings of ramyun!
(Suddenly timid) 2 servings of rabokki...
That's too much for 2 people!
It's actually just for me!

I'll all for me!
(How funny) Just you? You can't finish it all!
- Are you a pig?! - A pig?
(Hits home)
(Grandma's kimbap is complete)
(Next up is rabokki)
(Old-fashioned rabokki)
(Gotta make the ramyun yourself)
(I'm gonna eat 3 packs)
Is that too much water?
(Way too much) Is it?
I have a restaurant too!
I also have a bunsik place!
(Can't believe it) You do?
Yes
Bunsik....

But if the owner eats all the food...
I have the huge tray!
You must be a pig to eat all of that
(A full table)
Mul-kimchi
is well-fermented!
(Completing the table with mul-kimchi) The mul-kimchi looks delicious
Thank you
Bon appétit
The ramyun looks delicious. I made it!
(Eat slowly)
Ramyun at a bunsik place is good even though I made it!
(Customer appears)
It's savory
Wait, what's this?
Are you gonna eat all this by yourself?

- Are you sure about that? - Yes!
(Looks delicious...)
No wonder
the kimbap is popular here
(Eventually, bought a roll)
I think it tastes even better
since I'm the one who made it
- Good luck to you - Goodbye
(She finished one bowl already)
(Oh my gosh)
You look tiny
but you eat a lot!
I'm eating the ramyun fast because they get soggy
This is great
(Finished 2)
Rabokki time

The rabokki
has so much noodles
It literally tastes like a mix of ramyun and tteokbokki
The kimbap tastes
very nutty like the ones my mom or grandma
used to make with sesame oil
The rice is well-cooked too
It's delicious
(So good at talking)
If it were the old days,
your mother-in-law would've kicked you out
for eating too much!
The noodles make up most of the rabokki dish,
followed by fish cakes and rice cakes respectively
(Wow)
Don't drink the soup

You'll get too full!
(I can't help it, ma'am)
I finished the noodles!
(Don't need to worry about doing the dishes)
The ramyun noodles were a bit soggy
but her noodles
are still nice and chewy
(That's called years of experience)
(Shocked) That was fast
You're a pig, not a human!
Oink oink
This will taste more like ramyun
Don't force yourself
You don't have to finish it all!
Me?
It's a lot of food

I'm totally fine!
I'm worried!
I'm worried!
I can eat 20 packs of ramyun!
- Really? - Yes!
Oh dear...
But you didn't gain weight!
What about me, ma'am?
You gained weight because you ate a lot
You
are a man but
you have breasts like a woman
(Harsh words)
Do you live here?
I live here
There are people who come to eat and others just swing by for a chat

Oh I see, you're not just trying to make money with this place
It's like a hangout place
It helps kill time
When customers come? And chat?
A lot of people come since it's been over 20 years
20 years? Then...
I'm over 80 years old!
Really?
Oh? But you don't look like that at all
(Made her day) (She looks amazing for her age)
(Tteokbokki sauce on her face)
(Watching)
Huh?
You have something on your face
(She's just cute in her eyes)
Thank you

(Tzuyang is eating her veggies) (I'll finished everything since I'm not the owner)
The kimbap is really delicious
The
fish cakes are so chewy and tasty
I'll dip 2 pieces of kimbap
in the soup...
(Escaping ingredients) It ripped!
(Caught them)
No!
It's still delicious
It's good with the ramyun soup
(You do you)
You actually finished it all!
It'd be hard for you to get married since you eat so much
(Big eater) 3.5 million people already know
That was such a good meal!

How can a human being eat that much?
Anyway, I just had a simple meal for lunch
It was such a warmhearted meal
It was a great meal today
(Calculating the price) Price!
- It's fine! - Excuse me?
- It's fine - What do you mean?
(Please accept it!) I ate so much!
Don't calculate it. You don't need to pay!
(It's cheap too) It's only 23,000 won?
Don't worry about it!
- No! Please accept it! - You don't have to pay!
(Please accept it) No, I have to pay
You remind me of my granddaughter
- No, no - It's fine
- When I say 'no', it means 'no'! - No

She's not letting me pay for the meal
I'm gonna secretly leave the money here
Don't pay for anything!
- (Heard everything) - Your hearing is very good
(She even cut watermelon for her) Have some watermelon
Thank you! Looks so good!
Looks so tasty
- (What else should I give her?) - I have to pay her somehow
Oh my, what is this?
You should've have...!
You're doing so much for me!
Thank you
Did you film mukbangs somewhere else too?
You're gonna film again?
Yes, I'm gonna eat again!
- (You don't have to pay) - No, no! Please accept it

Please...!
I did
(I'll just take 10,000 won) Don't say that
No, no, no
Stop! No more!
Don't even thank me!
I really enjoyed the meal
Your stomach is still flat!
No! It's pretty full!
(Proud) I see, it is!
(It was nice meeting you)
- Take care of your health - Yes, you as well
I didn't want to just leave like that
so I bought her some meat
I don't think she's gonna accept this..
(As expected) You shouldn't have!!

No
(It's a small gift in appreciation of her kindness) I bought a high-quality one
You shouldn't have
- Please enjoy! - Oh dear
- You didn't need to spend your money on this! - It's fine
Goodbye! Take care!
(Please stay healthy)
